explanation: The recommendation explicitly combines IAM Identity Center account assignments with Organizations SCPs, but its service scope lists only AWS Organizations. The omission can hide the workforce-access half of the objective from downstream mappings.
required_action: Add AWS IAM Identity Center to scope.services while retaining AWS Organizations.
suggested_revision: scope.services should include AWS IAM Identity Center and AWS Organizations.

supporting_source.locator: Assigning AWS account access; Enforcing and limiting access
supporting_source.title: Configure access to AWS accounts
